title: The Den
description:
The Den Official Modpack

This modpack is just an amalgamation of mods that I find fun to use together, and use on my server, The Den!
body:
The Den's Official Modpack!


<details>
<summary>What's In Store (Latest Version)</summary>

Adds a whole mechanical system thanks to Create and it's add-ons
Combines a number of world gen mods for 400+ new biomes to explore
Revamps the End Fight and the Deep Dark
Revamps the magic system with Enchancement
Adds more explosives thanks to Blast
Gives minecraft more ambience thanks to a whole bunch of sound and visual mods
Funky portals with Immersive Portals
Simple Voice Chat with Sound Physics Remastered for proximity chat with oh so satisfying reverb, Crazy personalisation with Customizable Player Models and a few others
A heap of optimisations so you don't need a NASA Quantum Computer
Speedy World multiplayer with e4mc
A massive amount of new and remade structures for a great exploration experience
Placable Items (Modded items are missing however I can't do a great deal about that unfortunately)
Better archeology system
Some decoration mods so you can have a fuly furnished home
Every biome gets a massive Overhaul
So so so so so much more that I'll leave as a surprise (I'm too lazy to list more)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Mod List</summary>

Mod list is under each version in the dependancies section :3

</details>


<details>
<summary>Setup Instructions</summary>

There may be a few small issues that can arise, here are how to fix said issues! If you're having an issue you don't see here, go to the 'Issues' page and let me know what's wrong!

1. Upon startup there will be a few errors and maybe a few advertisements by mod creators. You can ignore any Immersive Portals warnings, everything should work fine.
2. Some shaders (E.g. Rethinking Voxels) freak out when you look at a portal, this is unavoidable. A shader that works fairly reliably is Photon, if you find more that work, let me know!
3. If you are having issues with a visual glitch, try pressing F3 and T at the same time, if that doesn't work, contact me and I will try to help!
4. The default keybinds are set up for a keyboard with Function keys 1-12 and a full number pad. Feel free to rebind if neccesary.
5. If you have an issue, please check the Issues page to see if it is already there!

</details>



You may use this pack for whatever you like! It's just a bunch of mods I thought were fun so why not! I uploaded it here so if anyone else wants to give it a go, they can, and it makes it easier for The Den members to download and update! 

I literally don't care what you do with this as long as you follow the directions of all of the mod creators, the content isn't mine, I just put them together and made sure it works. I wouldn't say claim it as yours because common sense but do whatever lol.
